title: Tiffany Marthin Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Tiffany Marthin Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Tiffany Marthin
Align Student
MS in Computer Science ’23
Seattle Campus
Shortly after beginning her career as an actuary, Tiffany Marthin felt concerned that her prospects were too narrow. Seeking more options, she discovered the Align program in Seattle, and now she’s gained confidence in a field known for its broad applicability.
Khoury College helped me build my confidence compared to two years ago when I had no experience at all … It’s definitely a journey, and it’s a good one
Tiffany Marthin, Align MSCS ’23
Explore all Khoury Stories
